emails.subject: Access Data base
emails.body: Access Data base Are you still using the Access Database for PC and if so, do you think this could be applied to Utility Usage portfolio MTM etc? BT

emails.subject: RE: Access Data base
emails.body: RE: Access Data base Yes, it could be used with of course excessive costs to buy. We're currently looking at re-working the code to update. To: Le Dain, Eric

emails.subject: RE: Access Data base
emails.body: With the crack team of developers that you had..... you should be able to fetch a pretty premium.!!! didn't she write code while eating her lunch and breast feeding her kids? To: Tycholiz, Barry
